scenarios.description: appendChild(TextNode) on parent with cached shadowChildrenRef invalidates cache via nodelistChanged
scenarios.precondition: Element parent has called children() to populate shadowChildrenRef
scenarios.expectedResult: shadowChildrenRef becomes null and children() returns only Element children unchanged
pseudocode: TEST TC07 appendChild(TextNode) invalidates shadow cache
access shadowChildrenRef before appendChild; // should be non-null
assert shadowChildrenRef after appendChild is null;
assert parent.children().size() == 1; // only the original Element

scenarios.description: appendChild on parent with >1 existing children assigns correct increasing siblingIndex
scenarios.precondition: Element parent has two existing children
pseudocode: TEST TC08 appendChild assigns incremented siblingIndex
